name: Meridian Macro
brandVoice: Analytical, globally-minded, data-driven. Speaks like a macro strategist at an APAC sell-side desk who sees markets through a cross-regional and cross-asset lens. Measured pace, active voice, precise vocabulary. Treats the reader as a professional investor who cares about flow, positioning, and policy interactions more than single-ticker trade ideas. Every claim about levels, probabilities, or directional bias comes from the source; interpretation is where the voice lives.
audienceProfile: Professional traders, portfolio managers, and CIOs at family offices and small institutional shops who trade APAC and global markets. They want cross-asset context, real flow data, and policy-aware framing — not single-market technical calls.

ctaLibrary.text: Meridian Macro subscribers receive the weekly APAC flow brief and quarterly cross-asset positioning deck.
Meridian Macro institutional accounts are available to qualified clients in Singapore, Hong Kong, and Tokyo.

forbiddenClaims: invented price levels not stated in the source
directional probabilities the source does not provide
brandPositioning: The macro research desk built for investors who trade across regions and asset classes. Cross-asset, flow-aware, policy-literate. Singapore-headquartered with a global lens.
companyBackground: Founded in 2011 in Singapore, part of the city-state's independent research ecosystem
45 analysts and strategists across Singapore, Hong Kong, and Tokyo offices
Publishes the quarterly APAC Positioning Survey (440 institutional respondents in Q4 2025)
Lead strategist Dr. Rina Kusuma was head of FX strategy at Fortune Bank Singapore (2007-2019)
Proprietary FlowScope dashboard aggregates regional order-flow data from 12 prime brokerages
Meridian Macro Weekly podcast syndicated across Bloomberg Asia and CNBC Asia
Research cited in 18 IMF working papers on EM capital flows
